name: Orange Chiffon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Oranges, peeled and chopped (about 1 cup of chopped orange segments)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust:
- Spray a 9-inch springform pan with nonstick vegetable spray.
- Blend the crust ingredients thoroughly and press over the bottom and halfway up the sides of the pan.
- Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 8 to 10 minutes or until set. Cool.
2. Filling:
- Pour orange juice into a small saucepan.
- Sprinkle gelatin over the orange juice and let soften for 1 minute.
- Heat, stirring constantly, until the gelatin dissolves (about 3 minutes).
- Blend the cream cheese and ricotta cheese in a large bowl until smooth.
- Prepare whipped topping according to package directions, substituting milk for water.
- Fold the whipped topping into the cheese mixture. Stir in the chopped oranges.
- Spoon into the prepared crust and spread evenly.
- Chill 6 hours or overnight.
This recipe makes one 9-inch cheesecake or 16 servings, with 1 slice per serving. Calories per serving: 149 (Normal Cheesecake: 374).
